title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: LAUREL HILL CENTER MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides substance abuse services including community support, assertive community treatment, medication management, and support in crisis. Certified Benefits Counselor may also assist individuals who need assistance in applying for and understanding their disability benefits. 2145 Centennial Plaza Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and diagnosed with a serious or persistent mental illness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 485-6340 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 485-6340 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan, UnitedHealthcare Choice, private pay, sliding scale fee. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene, Junction City, Springfield, and Veneta SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus route 13 Centennial, LTD bus route 66 VRC/Coburg Services: Assertive Community Treatment Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Mental Health Related Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PATHWAYS WELLNESS CENTER EMPLOYMENT - SUPPORTED EMPLOYMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - FEDERALLY SUBSIDIZED HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAUREL HILL CENTER
